title: Duplication Table
description:
Adds a very important new table to Minecraft!

(it's too op, believe me. Absolutely when combined with the phone mod)
body:
Version 1.17.1 support arrived!

 

1.17 Now allows you to craft the special block. In order to craft it, fill the entire Crafting Grid with Cobblestone. It's easy as that.

 There was a problem that it showed the mod was for Fabric, but that is now fixed. This mod allows Forge only.

NEW: 1.16.5 version fixed, added crafting recipe, and removed "X" slot.

This mod gives you the opportunity to clone, duplicate or whatever you call it. You have a LOT of different buttons, 16x the current amount, 32x, 64x, 128x and 1024 And, off course, the main button: 2x the amount. You can clone every item you want, with this mod. It's extremely helpful in survival, and it can be lots of fun to play with. The maximum duplication size per item is 1024. But i think that isn't a really big of a problem. There's also a bug; if you duplicate tools, or armor, to 64, and if you then drop it directly from the dupe table, you will get stacked tools. It's actually a bug of Minecraft. But there are many cool things you can do with it.
